prompt.en: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Generate the character from the current attributes. Create exactly ONE full-body clean anime character illustration of Kuze Nario, a 37-year-old male night radio weather announcer in a modern city. Single character only. He is a bulky soft-strong HUMAN adult man with natural healthy warm peach-beige skin, not yellow, not orange, not jaundiced, not green, not gray-green, a substantial rounded body, very broad shoulders, thick chest, thick arms, thick hands, a square-round face, deep blue-gray eyes, a calm expression as if listening to distant thunder, short deep blue-black hair with silver-gray highlights, a short old scar behind his right ear, and a small sound-wave scale tattoo partly visible below the left collarbone. Costume test requirement: absolutely NO apron, NO apron front, NO waist apron, NO chef apron, NO florist apron, NO archive apron, NO apron straps, and NO large cloth panel covering the waist or belly. His life scene is a night radio studio and rooftop weather antenna; movement needs include standing broadcast posture, climbing a short ladder, adjusting radio gear, and walking quickly through rain; social visibility is a modern media worker, not a service-window clerk. Outfit: a fitted plain white short-sleeve top wrapping his thick torso; a short midnight-blue rain half-cape over the shoulders, open at the front and stopping above the waist; a silver-gray diagonal equipment sling across the thick chest connected to a compact radio pouch; high-waist wine-red wide-pleated trousers with a clean waistband fully visible, no front cloth panel; deep blue-brown thick-soled loafer shoes; one dark blue fingerless radio glove and a white wrist wrap on the other hand. Signature prop: a silver-gray tuning-fork microphone that can tune rain noise into a short protective frequency. Fantasy anchor: only a few restrained silver-blue sound-wave lines near the tuning-fork microphone and earphone cord, compact low glow, tidy and urban first. Use a clean anime material language: flat color blocks, simple cel-shaded folds, tidy weatherproof cloth shape, small simplified metal accents; no photoreal fabric grain, no glossy leather, no wet material, no fashion-photo rendering. Style: Kyoto Animation-inspired fresh TV anime cel shading, crisp clean linework, simple readable shadow shapes, polished modern urban fantasy character design, visually denoised, minimal dirt and grime. Composition: centered standing pose, full body visible from head to shoes, generous padding, no cropping, clean cutout-ready silhouette. The style reference is only for bulky adult male body proportion, clean line quality, coloring method, and drawing style; do not copy the reference character face, clothing, pose, props, colors, or identity. Background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background only, one uniform magenta color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no extra main objects, no watermark, no strong diffuse glow, no dust, no oil stains, no rust, no wasteland mood, no apron, no waist apron, no apron front, no belly-covering apron panel, no yellow skin, no orange skin, no jaundiced skin. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere on the character, props, effects, reflections, or aura.
prompt.cn: 只画一个人物：久世鸣央，37岁男性，城市夜间电台气象播报员。Generate the character from the current attributes. 他是壮壮软厚的成年男性，宽肩厚胸，大手臂，暖桃米色健康肤色，方圆脸，深蓝灰眼，像在听远处雷声的沉静表情，深蓝黑短发带银灰挑染，右耳后有一道短浅旧疤，左锁骨下有小型声波刻度纹身。服装设计门槛测试：本角色明确禁止围裙、围裙前片、围裙带、厨师围裙、花店围裙、档案围裙或任何覆盖腰腹的工作围裙结构。生活场景是夜间电台与屋顶气象天线，动作需要站立播报、攀上短梯、调节收音设备和避雨快走；社会可见度是都市媒体工作者，不是服务窗口职员。穿白色贴身短袖上衣，外搭短款午夜蓝防雨半斗篷，半斗篷从肩部展开但前胸敞开；银灰斜挎设备带横过厚实胸口，连接小型收音腰包；下装是高腰酒红宽褶长裤，裤脚利落，深蓝棕色厚底乐福鞋。单侧深蓝无指收音手套，另一只手缠白色腕带。招牌道具是银灰调频音叉麦克风，可以把雨声调成短暂的保护频率。幻想锚点只在音叉麦克风和耳机线附近出现少量银蓝声波线。京都动画式清爽 TV 动画赛璐璐，线条干净，阴影块面概括，现代都市为主、轻量奇幻为辅。单人全身，从头到鞋完整可见，留足边距。背景必须是纯 #ff00ff 平面洋红绿幕。禁止 UI、信息图、图表、设定表、文字、标签、图标、多人、裁切、水印、围裙、腰围裙、围裙前片、脏污、油亮写实材质。

forbidden: profile attributes appended directly to image prompt
generation notes appended directly to image prompt

chromaKey.name: green
chromaKey.reason: Prompt includes magenta/pink/violet elements, so green is the safer contrasting key color.
